positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for vladimir_not_rfo_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    has_citizenship(X0,united_states) | has_citizenship(X0,taiwan)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~has_citizenship(vladimir,taiwan)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~has_citizenship(X0,taiwan) | ~russian_federation_official(X0)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    russian_federation_official(vladimir)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define can_register_to_vote(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define can_participate_in_election(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define manager_at(X0,X1) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
